ogTitle: Coburg North vs Cocamba: Climate Safety

heading: Coburg North vs Cocamba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coburg North, Victoria and Cocamba, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cocamba has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Coburg North (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coburg North or Cocamba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coburg North has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Cocamba scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coburg North scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Cocamba scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coburg North or Cocamba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cocamba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
